geography.data_source: Greater Chennai Corporation ward map 2022, GCC boundary shapefiles

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Chennai district tables, Perambur-Kolathur ward-level census data, estimated growth at 1.2% CAGR

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round (2020-21) Tamil Nadu urban tables, PLFS 2022-23 for manufacturing zone estimates, North Chennai industrial belt employment survey

commute_profile.data_source: CMP Chennai 2018 mode share survey, MTC ridership data for North Chennai routes, limited metro coverage in this zone as of 2024

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Estimated from NSSO consumption data for lower-mid income urban TN, DMK/AIADMK political mobilisation history in North Chennai, Lokniti-CSDS 2024

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from residential zone homogeneity patterns, high clustering due to established neighbourhood networks

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from Perambur market area commercial activity, GCC market survey
Estimated from Kolathur junction commercial zone, MTC bus stop footfall data
Estimated from GCC street vendor census 2021 for North Chennai wards

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Adjusted Middle Income Residential (lower) template for North Chennai's manufacturing/trade character, increased daily_wage_worker share

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from GCC ward councillor count for North Chennai zones, strong union presence in manufacturing belt
